parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Optional. Filter by status: draft, open, closed.

parameters.name: filter[mode]
parameters.description: Optional. Filter by mode: full_count, adjustment.

parameters.name: filter[archived]
parameters.description: Optional. archived filter: none (default, non-archived only), only (archived only), all (all records).

parameters.name: filter[variance_direction]
parameters.description: Optional. Filter by variance direction: positive, negative, neutral.

parameters.name: filter[is_initial_count]
parameters.description: Optional. Filter by initial count (1 or 0).

parameters.name: filter[value_change]
parameters.description: Optional. Filter by value change amount.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional. Search by ID, notes, or warehouse name.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Optional. Sort field (prefix - for descending). Allowed: id, date_count, status, value_change, variance_direction, created_at, updated_at.
